action: In the file picker GUI of Visual Studio Code's 'Open Folder...' dialog, navigate to the 'Documents' directory. Right-click inside the Documents folder area and select 'New Folder'. Name the new folder 'CalculatorApp'. After creating the folder, select the 'CalculatorApp' folder and click 'Select Folder' or 'OK' to open it.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The current screen shows a file picker dialog, likely from Visual Studio Code's 'Open Folder...' feature. The task is to navigate to the 'Documents' directory. There is a 'Documents' folder visible (Box ID 2). The first step is to double-click on the 'Documents' folder to enter it.

previous action: The instruction was to double-click the 'Documents' folder to enter it. The current screen now shows the contents of the 'Documents' directory, with several folders visible and the address bar indicating we are inside 'Documents'. This confirms the previous action succeeded. The next step is to right-click inside the folder area (not on an existing folder) to bring up the context menu and create a new folder. I will right-click in an empty area of the folder list.

previous action: The instruction was to right-click in an empty area of the Documents folder to bring up the context menu. The current screen now shows a context menu, which confirms the right-click was successful. The next step is to select 'New Folder' from the context menu to create a new folder.

previous action: The instruction was to click 'New Folder' from the context menu. The current screen now shows a new folder named 'New folder' in the Documents directory, and the folder name is editable (highlighted and ready for renaming). This confirms the previous action succeeded. The next step is to type the new folder name 'CalculatorApp' to rename the folder.

previous action: The instruction was to type 'CalculatorApp' to rename the new folder. The current screen now shows a folder named 'CalculatorApp' in the Documents directory, confirming the rename was successful. The next step is to select the 'CalculatorApp' folder so it can be opened. I will click on the 'CalculatorApp' folder (Box ID 71) to select it.

previous action: The instruction was to select the 'CalculatorApp' folder by clicking on it. The current screen shows the 'CalculatorApp' folder highlighted, indicating it is selected. The next step is to confirm the selection and open this folder. There is a 'Select Folder' button (Box ID 40) visible at the bottom right of the dialog. Clicking this will complete the folder selection process as required by the task.
